name: PunaMusta Media Oyj
summary: PunaMusta Media Oyj publishes newspapers and magazines in Finland. It also offers digital marketing portals, digital display solutions, and advertising and digital printing services; and operates radio stations. In addition, the company engages in securities trading, and real estate rental activities. The company was formerly known as Pohjois-Karjalan Kirjapaino Oyj and changed its name to PunaMusta Media Oyj in April 2019. PunaMusta Media Oyj was founded in 1874 and is based in Joensuu, Finland.
